group.name: Implement FAT16 directory management with 'mkdir', 'chdir', 'create', 'read', 'delete'
group.description: Enhance FAT16 filesystem with full directory management, including creation, navigation, listing, and file operations.

file.summary: Adds core logic for FAT16 directory management, including path resolution, directory creation, navigation, and file operations within directories.
Updates the FAT16 header to expose new directory management and working directory functions.

group.name: Add 'mem', 'settings', 'tcc', 'ping', 'ret-contents', 'localip' shell commands
group.description: Introduce new shell commands for memory, settings, C compilation, and network operations.

file.summary: Implements new shell commands: 'mem', 'settings', 'tcc', 'ping', 'ret-contents', and 'localip', enhancing shell functionality.

group.name: Refactor kernel initialization and remove deprecated files
group.description: Streamline kernel initialization and remove obsolete kernel, IDT, and build-related files.

file.summary: Removes the main kernel C file, indicating a significant architectural change or relocation of kernel entry point.
Removes the LICENSE file, which is a critical change and might indicate a license update or relocation.
Removes the 'toastIDT.c' file, suggesting a change in how Interrupt Descriptor Table (IDT) is managed.
Removes the IDT assembly file, indicating a change in low-level interrupt handling.
Removes the kernel assembly file, suggesting a change in the low-level kernel entry or boot process.
Removes the GRUB configuration file, implying a change in the bootloader or boot process.
Removes the IDT header file, reflecting changes in interrupt descriptor table definitions.
Removes the linker script, indicating a change in how the kernel and its components are linked.
Removes the ISR0 handler, indicating a change in how divide-by-zero exceptions are handled.
Removes the setjmp/longjmp assembly file, possibly indicating a change in context switching or exception handling.
Removes the IDT C file, reflecting changes in interrupt descriptor table management.
Removes the macOS build script, suggesting a consolidation or change in the build system.
Removes the Windows batch build script, indicating a change in the build system for Windows.
Removes the WSL build script, suggesting a consolidation or change in the build system.
Removes the README.md file, possibly due to relocation or a complete rewrite of documentation.
Removes an initial macOS build script, suggesting a streamlined build process.
Removes a development-related markdown file, likely part of documentation cleanup.
Removes a filesystem-related markdown file, likely part of documentation cleanup.

group.name: Add FAT16 file entry timestamping and directory listing details
group.description: Integrate time-based stamping for FAT16 file entries and display timestamps in directory listings.

file.summary: Implements 'fat16_encode_time', 'fat16_encode_date', and 'fat16_stamp_entry' for timestamping, and updates directory listing to show timestamps.

group.name: Enforce default registry keys with 'ensure_default_key' and save changes
group.description: Ensure critical registry keys have default values and persist them if modified.

file.summary: Adds 'ensure_default_key' function and uses it to set and save default values for critical kernel registry keys during initialization.

group.name: Add 'printf' function and 'toast_shell_color' for console output
group.description: Introduce a new 'printf' function and colored shell prompts to enhance console output readability.

file.summary: Adds a new 'printf' function and updates shell prompts to use 'toast_shell_color' for colored output.

group.name: Update 'setupProgram' with screen clearing and final splash screen
group.description: Improve the setup program's user experience with screen clearing and a final splash screen.

file.summary: Adds 'clear_screen()' calls and a final splash screen with a delay to 'setupProgram' for a better user experience.

group.name: Synchronize time settings from registry and parse timezone strings
group.description: Load and parse timezone and time format settings from the registry for consistent time display.

file.summary: Adds functions to parse timezone strings and synchronize time settings from the registry, updating 'timezone_offset' and 'use_24hr'.

group.name: Update 'editor_open' to prompt for 'toastreg.txt' editing
group.description: Add a security prompt before editing 'toastreg.txt' to prevent accidental modifications.

file.summary: Modifies 'editor_open' to include a security prompt for editing 'toastreg.txt'.

group.name: Update FreeType library configuration to disable LZW and ZLIB
group.description: Optimize FreeType library for toastOS by disabling LZW and ZLIB compression support.

file.summary: Disables LZW and ZLIB compression options in FreeType configuration for toastOS.

group.name: Simplify FreeType standard library includes with 'toast_libc.h'
group.description: Replace multiple standard library includes in FreeType with a single 'toast_libc.h' for consistency.

file.summary: Replaces multiple standard C library includes with a single 'toast_libc.h' in FreeType's 'ftstdlib.h'.

group.name: Set 'TOASTOS/KERNEL/TIMEZONE' in registry during setup and timezone command
group.description: Persist timezone settings to the registry during initial setup and when changed via command.

file.summary: Adds 'reg_set("TOASTOS/KERNEL/TIMEZONE", tz)' to persist timezone changes made via the shell command.
Adds 'reg_set("TOASTOS/KERNEL/TIMEZONE", tz)' to persist the timezone setting during the initial setup program.

group.name: Remove Mac-specific FreeType component and streamline module loading
group.description: Remove Mac-specific FreeType component and simplify the list of loaded FreeType modules.

file.summary: Comments out the include for 'ftmac.c' in FreeType's base source, removing Mac-specific code.
Streamlines the FreeType module configuration to load only essential modules for toastOS.

group.name: Remove 'Delete' key panic and map to ASCII 127
group.description: Change 'Delete' key behavior from system panic to ASCII 127 for standard input handling.

file.summary: Removes the panic trigger for 'Delete' key (0x53) and maps it to ASCII 127 in the keyboard scan code table.

group.name: Miscellaneous Updates and Fixes
group.description: Apply minor updates and fixes across various application and service files.

file.summary: Includes 'mmu.h' in 'tapplayer.c', likely to enable memory management functions for the application player.
Adds a blank line at the end of the 'obama.c' file, a minor formatting change.

group.name: Add 'security.h' and 'security.c' files
group.description: Introduce new security-related files for future security features.

file.summary: Adds a new, empty 'security.c' file, likely for future security implementations.
Adds a new, empty 'security.h' header file, likely for future security implementations.

group.name: Update IDE configuration for backend code editor settings
group.description: Adjust IDE backend code editor settings for improved development experience.

file.summary: Updates IDE workspace settings, including backend code editor configurations and run manager entries.
Adds extensive backend code editor settings, primarily for C++ code inspection severities and formatting rules.

list.name: Add 'security.h' and 'security.c' files
list.comment: Introduce new security-related files for future security features.

list.name: Enforce default registry keys with 'ensure_default_key' and save changes
list.comment: Ensure critical registry keys have default values and persist them if modified.

list.name: Implement FAT16 directory management with 'mkdir', 'chdir', 'create', 'read', 'delete'
list.comment: Enhance FAT16 filesystem with full directory management, including creation, navigation, listing, and file operations.

list.name: Miscellaneous Updates and Fixes
list.comment: Apply minor updates and fixes across various application and service files.

list.name: Refactor kernel initialization and remove deprecated files
list.comment: Streamline kernel initialization and remove obsolete kernel, IDT, and build-related files.

list.name: Remove Mac-specific FreeType component and streamline module loading
list.comment: Remove Mac-specific FreeType component and simplify the list of loaded FreeType modules.

list.name: Set 'TOASTOS/KERNEL/TIMEZONE' in registry during setup and timezone command
list.comment: Persist timezone settings to the registry during initial setup and when changed via command.

list.name: Simplify FreeType standard library includes with 'toast_libc.h'
list.comment: Replace multiple standard library includes in FreeType with a single 'toast_libc.h' for consistency.

list.name: Synchronize time settings from registry and parse timezone strings
list.comment: Load and parse timezone and time format settings from the registry for consistent time display.

list.name: Update FreeType library configuration to disable LZW and ZLIB
list.comment: Optimize FreeType library for toastOS by disabling LZW and ZLIB compression support.

list.name: Update IDE configuration for backend code editor settings
list.comment: Adjust IDE backend code editor settings for improved development experience.

project.component: { "keyToString": { "CMake Application.toastOS.executor": "Run", "ModuleVcsDetector.initialDetectionPerformed": "true", "RunOnceActivity.MCP Project settings loaded": "true", "RunOnceActivity.RadMigrateCodeStyle": "true", "RunOnceActivity.ShowReadmeOnStart": "true", "RunOnceActivity.TerminalTabsStorage.copyFrom.TerminalArrangementManager.252": "true", "RunOnceActivity.cidr.known.project.marker": "true", "RunOnceActivity.git.unshallow": "true", "RunOnceActivity.readMode.enableVisualFormatting": "true", "RunOnceActivity.typescript.service.memoryLimit.init": "true", "RunOnceActivity.west.config.association.type.startup.service": "true", "SHELLCHECK.PATH": "I do mind", "Shell Script.Build toastOS.executor": "Debug", "cf.first.check.clang-format": "false", "cidr.known.project.marker": "true", "com.intellij.ml.llm.matterhorn.ej.ui.settings.DefaultModelSelectionForGA.v1": "true", "git-widget-placeholder": "main", "junie.onboarding.icon.badge.shown": "true", "last_opened_file_path": "C:/Users/toastman/Documents/toastOS", "node.js.detected.package.eslint": "true", "node.js.detected.package.tslint": "true", "node.js.selected.package.eslint": "(autodetect)", "node.js.selected.package.tslint": "(autodetect)", "nodejs_package_manager_path": "npm", "org.rust.first.attach.projects": "true", "settings.editor.selected.configurable": "preferences.lookFeel", "to.speed.mode.migration.done": "true", "vue.rearranger.settings.migration": "true" } }
